2604.27852.title: NeocorRAG: Less Irrelevant Information, More Explicit Evidence, and More Effective Recall via Evidence Chains
2604.27852.paper_summary: Although precise recall is a core objective in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), a critical oversight persists in the field: improvements in retrieval performance do not consistently translate to commensurate gains in downstream reasoning. To diagnose this gap, we propose the Recall Conversion Rate (RCR), a novel evaluation metric to quantify the contribution of retrieval to reasoning accuracy. Our quantitative analysis of mainstream RAG methods reveals that as Recall@5 improves, the RCR exhibits a near-linear decay. We identify the neglect of retrieval quality in these methods as the underlying cause. In contrast, approaches that focus solely on quality optimization often suffer from inferior recall performance. Both categories lack a comprehensive understanding of retrieval quality optimization, resulting in a trade-off dilemma. To address these challenges, we propose comprehensive retrieval quality optimization criteria and introduce the NeocorRAG framework. This framework achieves holistic retrieval quality optimization by systematically mining and utilizing Evidence Chains. Specifically, NeocorRAG first employs an innovative activated search algorithm to obtain a refined candidate space. Then it ensures precise evidence chain generation through constrained decoding. Finally, the retrieved set of evidence chains guides the retrieval optimization process. Evaluated on benchmarks including HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, MuSiQue, and NQ, NeocorRAG achieves SOTA performance on both 3B and 70B parameter models, while consuming less than 20% of tokens used by comparable methods. This study presents an efficient, training-free paradigm for RAG enhancement that effectively optimizes retrieval quality while maintaining high recall. Our code is released at https://github.com/BUPT-Reasoning-Lab/NeocorRAG.
2604.27852.paper_summary_zh: 儘管精確回憶是檢索增強生成（RAG）的核心目標，但該領域仍存在一個關鍵的忽視：檢索性能的改善並不總是能夠轉化為下游推理的相應增益。為了診斷這一差距，我們提出了回憶轉換率（RCR），這是一種新穎的評估指標，用於量化檢索對推理準確性的貢獻。我們對主流RAG方法的定量分析顯示，隨著Recall@5的改善，RCR呈現近乎線性的衰減。我們確定這些方法忽視檢索質量是根本原因。相反，專注於質量優化的方式往往表現出較差的回憶性能。這兩類方法都缺乏對檢索質量優化的全面理解，導致了權衡困境。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了全面的檢索質量優化標準，並介紹了NeocorRAG框架。該框架通過系統性挖掘和利用證據鏈來實現整體檢索質量優化。具體而言，NeocorRAG首先採用創新的激活搜索算法來獲得精煉的候選空間。然後，它通過約束解碼確保精確的證據鏈生成。最後，檢索到的證據鏈集指導檢索優化過程。在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA、MuSiQue和NQ等基準上進行評估，NeocorRAG在3B和70B參數模型上達到了SOTA性能，同時消耗的令牌少於可比方法的20%。本研究提出了一種高效的無需訓練的RAG增強範式，能有效優化檢索質量，同時保持高回憶率。我們的代碼已在 https://github.com/BUPT-Reasoning-Lab/NeocorRAG 上發布。
2604.27852.author: Shiyao Peng et.al.
2604.27852.authors: Shiyao Peng, Qianhe Zheng, Zhuodi Hao, Zichen Tang, Rongjin Li, Qing Huang, Jiayu Huang, Jiacheng Liu, Yifan Zhu, Haihong E
